metadata.defaultDescription: In-person party games you can play with a single phone. No signup required.
metadata.aboutDescription: Learn about FunSpace — in-person party games for friends, playable on one shared phone.
metadata.playersDescription: Manage your saved player names for FunSpace party games.

home.heroTagline: Party games for friends, one phone
home.gamesSubheading: Pick a game and play together in the same room.

about.title: About FunSpace
about.description: FunSpace is a collection of in-person party games you can play with friends using a single shared phone. No accounts, no downloads — just open the site and play.

features.title: What we offer
features.catalog: A growing catalog of word-based and social games
features.singlePhone: Every game works on one shared device

impostor.name: Impostor
impostor.description: Find the impostor who doesn't know the secret word. Pass the phone to reveal roles privately.

hangman.name: Hangman
hangman.description: Guess the word letter by letter before the drawing is complete.

neverHaveIEver.name: Never Have I Ever
neverHaveIEver.description: Read prompts aloud and learn surprising things about your friends.

shellDemo.name: Shell Demo
shellDemo.description: A minimal demo game to validate setup, reveal, play, and resolve.

gameShell.comingSoonMessage: This game is not playable yet. Check back soon!

setup.title: Choose players
setup.subtitle: Select {min}–{max} players from your saved roster.
setup.emptyRoster: Add players on the Players page before starting a game.

shellDemo.playMessage: Discuss freely — this is a demo.
shellDemo.completeMessage: You finished the full game shell lifecycle.

setup.emptyRoster: Add players on the Players page before starting a game.
setup.playersSubtitle: Select {min}–{max} players from your saved roster.

presetTooltips.classic: 1 impostor, no spies. Best for learning the rules.
presetTooltips.withSpy: 1 impostor and 1 spy. The spy gets a similar word and wins with civilians.
presetTooltips.chaos: 2 impostors for bigger groups. Harder for civilians to survive!
presetTooltips.custom: Set your own impostor and spy counts.

validation.emptyRoster: Add players on the Players page before starting.
validation.noPacks: Select at least one word pack.
validation.noCivilians: Too many impostors and spies — at least one civilian is required.
validation.tooManyImpostors: Too many impostors for this player count.
validation.tooManySpies: Too many spies for this player count.

reveal.impostorMessage: You don't know the secret word. Blend in and survive.

play.instructions: Discuss and give clues. When the group decides someone is out, eliminate them here.

goal.title: Goal
goal.body: Most players know a secret word. One or more impostors don't. Give clues, discuss at the table, and figure out who is faking it before the impostors take over.

items.civilian: Civilian — knows the secret word and tries to find the impostors.
items.impostor: Impostor — does not know the word and must blend in. Impostors don't know each other.
items.spy: Spy (optional) — gets a similar decoy word and wins with the civilians.

steps.1: Choose players and options, then start the game.
steps.2: Pass the phone around — each player privately sees their role and word (or an impostor message).
steps.3: Discuss at the table and give verbal clues. There is no timer and voting happens in real life, not in the app.
steps.4: When the group agrees someone is out, eliminate them in the app. Their role stays hidden until the end.
steps.5: Keep playing until civilians eliminate all impostors, or only impostors remain alive.

items.civilians: Civilians (and any spy) win when all impostors have been eliminated.
items.impostors: Impostors win when only impostors are still alive.

setup.emptyRoster: Add players on the Players page before starting a game.
setup.playersSubtitle: Select {min}–{max} players from your saved roster.

presetTooltips.forgiving: 8 wrong guesses — a little more room for the group.
presetTooltips.custom: Choose your own max wrong guesses (4–10).

validation.emptyRoster: Add players on the Players page before starting.
validation.noPacks: Select at least one word pack.

play.instructions: Discuss as a group and tap letters on the phone. Wrong guesses build the hangman.

goal.title: Goal
goal.body: Guess the secret word letter by letter before the hangman drawing is complete. Everyone plays together on one phone.

items.group: The group — suggest letters aloud and agree on each guess together.
items.phone: The phone — picks a secret word, tracks guesses, and draws the hangman.

steps.1: Choose players, difficulty, and word packs, then start.
steps.2: The app picks a secret word and shows blanks.
steps.3: Discuss and tap letters — correct guesses reveal letters everywhere they appear.
steps.4: Keep guessing until you complete the word or run out of wrong guesses.

items.civilians: You win when every letter in the word has been guessed.
items.impostors: You lose when wrong guesses reach the limit and the word is still incomplete.

players.title: Players
players.description: Save your group's names once and reuse them in every game.
players.emptyDescription: Add the friends you play with — names are saved on this device for all games.
